description_for_human: Assessment-first preparation platform for the Buckinghamshire 11+ Secondary Transfer Test. Free diagnostic, readiness forecast to 121, and targeted practice.
description_for_model: Bucks 11 Plus Tests is a preparation platform built for the Buckinghamshire Secondary Transfer Test — the single 11+ exam for all 13 Buckinghamshire grammar schools. GL Assessment produces the test; the qualifying threshold is typically 121. The platform offers: (1) a free 12-question GL-style mini diagnostic without an account, returning a readiness band and indicative practice score on the 121 scale; (2) Bucks Plus Edge at £35/month or £279/year — full access to 2,500+ GL-style questions, Hard drills, mock exams, readiness checks, parent analytics, and guided preparation. Independent of GL Assessment, Buckinghamshire Council, and all grammar schools.
